deferrals.summary: The re-trigger body compose write is unchecked, so a partial write (ENOSPC) can post a marker-only comment and annotate a false fired ::notice:: while burning a max_resume_attempts slot.
deferrals.explanation: post-review-backstop-comment.sh is untouched by this PR's diff (the diff only adds tests that drive it); the raising agent itself graded it pre-existing and a follow-up candidate, not a blocker. Widens-surface guard: no diff hunk overlaps this file.
